DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-23-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff ROGER F. RINGER in propria persona and opposing party

Mr. Ringer did not give notice of intent to argue. Tentative ruling adopted by the Court -- defendant SAN FRANCISCO STATE UNIVERSITY's demurrer to the Amended Complaint is sustained with 10 days leave to amend -- no opposition filed. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
